sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.58b (beta): Fixes a scan that could stay stuck at N-1/N (e.g. 14/15) on screen until a hard refresh. The live progress poll hits a fixed worker URL, so a cached in-progress snapshot could mask scan completion; the poll and the worker status endpoint are now uncacheable (Cache-Control: no-store). The scan itself always finished and was billed correctly.
